overall.description: A third-person perspective walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring neon-lit buildings, digital billboards, and bustling city streets. The character navigates through crosswalks, covered walkways, and open intersections while following NPCs and observing the vibrant urban environment.

events.description: maroon van drives past the crosswalk from left to right
character begins walking forward from the street corner onto the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: starting at a street corner crosswalk and beginning to walk along the sidewalk

pedestrian in red jacket waiting at the corner

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a futuristic city crosswalk with a maroon van passing by. The camera follows a third-person character standing at the corner near a traffic light, surrounded by tall buildings with neon trim and digital billboards. The character begins walking forward onto the sidewalk as other pedestrians wait at the corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with distinctive red pavement

events.description: enters the red-tiled covered walkway section of the street
begins following a character dressed in orange robes walking ahead

agents.ego_description: following a character in orange robes along the red-tiled sidewalk

notable_agents.action: character in orange robes walking steadily ahead
woman with short blonde hair walking alongside the path

entered.detail: shiny red pavement tiles reflecting sunlight
tall building with reflective glass facade and multiple stories
green metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street
dark overhanging structure with pink neon accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a distinctive red-tiled sidewalk between futuristic buildings, following an NPC in orange robes. The path is lined with a green metal railing on the left separating it from parked cars, while the right side features dark building facades with neon accents. Other pedestrians walk alongside as the camera maintains a steady following shot.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with monumental digital signage

events.description: emerges from narrow walkway into open plaza intersection with large billboards
turns right to cross the intersection toward the Fourth Wall building
crosses the street as vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating through the intersection while looking up at the surrounding architecture and billboards

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large red and black building with prominent REALRO STUDIO signage
futuristic tower with green-tinted glass facade rising above the intersection
massive wall displaying PASSION advertisements with portrait imagery
wide staircase leading up to an elevated plaza area
tall palm trees arranged around the open plaza space

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a wide-open urban intersection dominated by the red REALRO STUDIO building and a towering green skyscraper. The camera turns right to cross the street, passing palm trees and concrete stairs while large digital billboards display advertisements. Vehicles drive through the intersection as the character navigates toward the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk lined with palm trees and street vendors

events.description: enters the sidewalk section adjacent to the Fourth Wall building
passes close to a large concrete pillar on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing street vendors and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: street vendor in orange outfit arranging items on the ground
pedestrian in purple shirt walking toward the camera

entered.detail: beige commercial building with large blue FOURTH WALL signage
massive cylindrical structural column of the adjacent building
elevated pedestrian walkway crossing above the street ahead
palm trees planted in raised planters along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the character along a sidewalk beside the Fourth Wall building, passing street vendors and palm trees. The path runs parallel to a busy street with moving traffic on the left, while a massive concrete pillar and modern glass building dominate the right side. The character continues walking toward a futuristic overpass visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense cyberpunk district that transitions from a crowded street corner into a wide, open urban intersection. It begins at a futuristic crosswalk beside a maroon van, where the camera tracks a character moving past neon-trimmed buildings and digital billboards. As the character advances, the scene shifts onto a red-tiled sidewalk lined with green metal railings and dark facades, following an NPC in orange robes through a steady stream of pedestrians. The environment then expands as the character emerges from the covered walkway into a vast intersection dominated by a red studio building and a towering green skyscraper, crossing the street past palm trees and active traffic. Finally, the camera follows the character along the sidewalk beside the Fourth Wall building and street vendors, moving past massive concrete pillars toward a distant futuristic overpass.
